# Barcelona Extropic Font — Typography System

> Production-ready typography: Rust WASM font rendering + Cloudflare Workers edge delivery.
> Didone-class typeface with 12:1 contrast, proof-of-render hashing.
> Created by Igor Holt.

## Features
- Rust WASM font rendering
- Cloudflare Workers edge delivery
- Universal deployment (web, iOS, Google Workspace)
- Proof-of-render cryptographic hashing

## Technology
- Part of Genesis Conductor infrastructure
- Edge-first architecture
- Thermodynamic verification compatible

## Creator
Igor Holt — AI Architect
https://genesisconductor.io
